title: Health Charted Symptoms
description: Symptom observations treated as scientific inquiry: observe, hypothesize, test, validate or invalidate.

severity.description: 1-5 per severity scale in data-routing guide or user override in my-config

context.description: Activity, environment, emotional state, time of day

new_symptom.description: True if this is the first report of this symptom

hypothesis.description: What might explain this, with evidence tier
